description_long: This is a two-story residential house with a hip roof covered in reddish-brown tiles. The exterior walls are painted white and feature a mix of rectangular and square windows with green frames, distributed asymmetrically across all sides. The front facade includes a covered carport supported by columns, a balcony above the main entrance, and a small overhang above the ground-floor window. The house has a modern, boxy structure with clean lines and minimal decorative elements. The rear and side elevations show additional windows and a secondary entryway, with the window arrangement varying in size and placement. The overall design is functional and contemporary, suitable for an urban neighborhood setting.
description: A modern two-story white house with a reddish-brown hip roof, green-framed windows, a covered carport, and a balcony above the main entrance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the carport, main entrance, balcony, and several green-framed windows.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the hip roof, upper and lower windows, and the side of the carport.
description_view_2: Rear view with a secondary entryway, asymmetrical window placement, and a simple white facade.
description_view_3: Right side view featuring a small overhang, two windows, and the side profile of the balcony.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a covered carport, balcony above, and minimal overhang supported by columns.
